🌾 UK Crop Management: Spring 2026

Current Priorities

Immediate Tasks

  • Soil testing – Last chance before spring drilling
  • Fertilizer planning – Order N by early March
  • Drill calibration – Check seed rates
  • Crop protection – Plan herbicide programs

Key Dates

Task Timing
First spring wheat Late Feb – Early March
Sugar beet drilling Mid-March
Spring OSR Early March (last chance)

Last updated: 26 February 2026
